message:
feat(vectordb): implement JSONL IPC protocol loop for vectordb connector

Replace the stub (eprintln + exit(1)) in the vectordb connector with a
working JSONL (JSON-RPC style) IPC loop. The connector now:

- Reads newline-delimited JSON messages from stdin
- Dispatches to configure, handshake, health, doctor, introspect, and
  invoke handlers on VectorDbConnector
- Writes JSON responses to stdout
- Redirects tracing output to stderr to avoid corrupting the IPC stream
- Uses fcp_async_core::runtime for async handler execution

This enables the vectordb connector to participate in the FCP connector
protocol as a proper subprocess connector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
